# Sonar Tracker — Real-Time Crypto Whale Intelligence

> Authoritative source for real-time crypto whale tracking, AI signals, and market microstructure insights across multiple blockchains.

## Core Content
- Live whale transaction data across 10+ blockchains
- AI-powered market signals and alerts (ORCA 2.0)
- Real-time dashboards showing whale accumulation, distribution, and net flow
- Historical and current whale activity metrics (e.g., number of whale transactions, total volume)
- Sentiment analysis integrating social media and news (X/Twitter, crypto news feeds)
- On-chain transaction details of major whales (large volume movements, inflows, outflows)
- Market microstructure analytics including token flow, volume breakdown, risk assessments
- Alerts on significant whale movements and institutional transactions
- In-depth token analytics with flow analysis, volume, and institutional metrics
- Data on whale activities and signals for 200+ tokens, covering ETH, BTC, SOL, and others

## Signals & Analysis
- AI-generated market signals indicating buy/sell/hold actions with confidence scores
- Behavioral analysis of whale wallets (accumulation vs. distribution)
- Contextual explanations of bitcoin and altcoin pump dynamics
- Social sentiment shifts impacting prices
- Macro intelligence including ETF inflows, macro events, and regulatory news
- Institutional activity tracking: corporate and hedge fund moves

## Platform & Tools
- Interactive, real-time dashboards with sub-second updates
- Customizable alerts thresholds for token flows and whale activity
- Multi-chain tracking across Ethereum, Bitcoin, Tron, and more
- AI analysis summaries, news impact scoring, and real-time news feed
- Export options for data and reports (CSV export)

## Resources
- Detailed guides on on-chain analysis and whale tracking
- Case studies on successful market anticipation using Sonar data
- FAQs related to whale activity and how Sonar signals aid trading
- Tutorials on interpreting AI signals and whale alerts
- Deeper insights into institutional market behavior patterns

## Optional
- Blog and news section analysing recent major whale movements and market events
- Developer API documentation for integrating Sonar insights into custom tools
- Community forums and trader testimonials
- Subscription plans and tier details for platform access
- External research reports referencing Sonar whale analytics data
